name: Combi Oven 5 Tray GN1/1
desc: Italian-designed touchscreen combi oven. Automatically selects optimal humidity. Self-cleaning. Grab & go racks included.

name: Combi Oven 7 Tray GN1/1
desc: The workhorse of the range. Pre-programmed recipes, auto humidity, self-cleaning and descaling. Ideal for cafes and restaurants.

name: Combi Oven 10 Tray GN1/1
desc: High-volume GN1/1 combi oven. 10 full size sheet pans on exclusive grab & go racks. Built for busy commercial kitchens.

name: Combi Oven 6 Tray GN2/1
desc: Full size GN2/1 combi oven for large-scale production kitchens. Accepts full gastronorm pans for maximum capacity.

name: Combi Oven 10 Tray GN2/1
desc: The flagship. 10 GN2/1 trays, 25.5kW, 3-phase power. Built for high-volume production. The most capable oven in the range.

name: Gastronorm Single Door Refrigerator 600L
desc: Top mount compressor. Exterior and interior stainless steel. Self-closing door. Fits GN pans. Pre-installed castors and mid-shelves.

name: Gastronorm Single Door Freezer 600L
desc: Heavy-duty top-mount freezer. Stainless interior and exterior. R290 refrigerant. Carel digital controller. 6 wired shelves included.

name: Gastronorm Double Door Refrigerator 1200L
desc: The most popular upright fridge in the range. 1200L capacity, twin doors, stainless construction. Suits any commercial kitchen.

name: Gastronorm Double Door Freezer 1200L
desc: High-capacity twin door freezer. R290 refrigerant, stainless construction, magnetic door gaskets. Fits full gastronorm pans.

name: Compact Single Door Refrigerator 410L
desc: Space-efficient single door fridge. 600mm wide, top mounted. Perfect for tight kitchens. Self-closing door and heavy duty castors.

name: Compact Double Door Refrigerator 900L
desc: 900L compact double door refrigerator. 1200mm wide with top-mounted compressor. Stainless interior and exterior, 40°C ambient.

name: Gastronorm 2 Door Underbench Refrigerator
desc: Gastronorm underbench fridge. Supports GN pans. R600a refrigerant, Carel digital controller, fan-forced cooling. Castors standard.

name: Gastronorm 3 Door Underbench Refrigerator
desc: 3-door gastronorm underbench fridge. 1795mm wide, ideal as a pass-through prep surface. Zero-emission insulation foam.

name: Blast Chiller 3 Tray
desc: Fully automatic blast chiller. Accepts GN1/1 or 600×400mm euronorm pans. Internal food probe for even temperature. Self-closing door.

name: Blast Chiller 10 Tray
desc: High-capacity 10 tray blast chiller. 178L, 2250W, suitable for large-scale production. Food probe ensures precise temperature control.

name: 2 Door Back Bar Cooler 208L
desc: Hinged door back bar cooler. 900mm wide. Black powder-coated exterior, aluminium interior. Fan cooling, LED light, digital temperature display.

name: 2 Sliding Door Back Bar Cooler 208L
desc: Sliding glass door back bar cooler. 900mm wide, front-venting. Perfect for under-counter installation. Self-closing locks and LED interior light.

name: Drink Cooler Single Door 380L
desc: Bottom-mounted single door drink cooler. Fan cooling, LED lights with canopy light. Self-evaporating water tray. 4 shelves included.

name: Drink Cooler Double Door 1000L
desc: High-volume double door sliding drink cooler. 1000L, LED lighting throughout. Perfect for busy bars, service stations and convenience stores.

name: Snowman Single Door Storage Refrigerator 430L
desc: Economy series gastronorm fridge. Digital controller, heavy duty compressor, stainless construction. Stamped panel for easy shelf adjustment.

name: Snowman Double Door Storage Refrigerator 860L
desc: Economy twin door gastronorm fridge. 860L, 1314mm wide. Digital controller, pre-installed castors and shelves. Fits GN pans.

name: 2 Burner Gas Cooktop with Stand
desc: Heavy-duty open burner cooktop with stand. Independent burner controls, flame failure, 3/4 inch gas inlet. Available NG and LPG.

name: 4 Burner Gas Cooktop with Stand
desc: 4-burner heavy duty cooktop with stand. Standby pilots, removable drip tray, heavy duty black matte trivets. 304 stainless construction.

name: 6 Burner Gas Cooktop with Stand
desc: 6-burner powerhouse cooktop. 168 MJ/h total output, 304 stainless, heavy duty trivets. The most popular cooktop in any commercial kitchen.

name: 8 Burner Gas Cooktop with Stand
desc: 8-burner heavy-duty cooktop. 1200mm wide, 224 MJ/h total output. For high-volume kitchens that never stop. NG and LPG available.

name: 600mm Gas Griddle with Stand
desc: Heavy-duty gas griddle. 16mm thick plate, piezo ignition, independent burner controls. Removable drip tray for easy cleaning.

name: 1200mm Gas Griddle with Stand
desc: Full-size 1200mm gas griddle. 100 MJ/h, heavy-duty 16mm plate. The definitive flat-top for high-volume breakfast and grill operations.

name: 300mm Gas Char Grill with Stand
desc: Compact char grill with heavy duty cast-iron grill surface. Stainless splash back, flame failure, piezo ignition. NG and LPG.

name: 600mm Gas Char Grill with Stand
desc: 600mm char grill. Cast iron cooking surface, stainless splash back, removable drip tray. Independent burner controls.

name: Gas Deep Fryer 3-4 Tube
desc: Gas approved Australia-wide. Thermostatic temperature control 0-240°C, automatic safety valve, oil cooling zone at base. 2 baskets included.

name: Gas Deep Fryer 5 Tube
desc: High-capacity 5 tube gas fryer. Can fit 3 small baskets. Night lid and additional baskets available as optional extras.

name: 4 Burner Gas Range with Oven
desc: 4-burner gas range with static oven. 100-300°C oven temperature control, oven pilot, multiple rack guides. Chrome rack included.

name: 6 Burner Gas Range with Oven
desc: 6-burner gas range with oven. The standard fit-out choice. 900mm wide, heavy-duty construction, tall splash back and high shelf.

name: Single Wok Range Natural Gas
desc: GasMark certified single wok range. 14" wok hole, waterless wok, duckbill burner. High splash back with shelf. Flame failure protection.

name: Double Wok Range Natural Gas
desc: Double wok range. GasMark by IAPMO R&T certified. 200 MJ/h total output. Duckbill burner or chimney burner available.

name: Stockpot Boiler Natural Gas
desc: Heavy-duty stockpot boiler. GasMark certified, flame failure with pilot, high splash back. Available natural gas or LPG.

name: Single Door Pizza Prep Refrigerator
desc: Single door pizza prep table. Stainless galvanised back panel, Dixell digital controller, self-closing door. 1/3 size pans 100mm deep included.

name: Double Door Pizza Prep Refrigerator
desc: Double door pizza prep table with granite top. Efficient refrigeration, heavy duty compressor, R600a and R290 refrigerant. Fan-forced cooling.

name: Single Door Sandwich Prep Refrigerator
desc: Single door sandwich prep table. Stainless steel GN food pans included. Efficient refrigeration, heavy duty Embraco compressor.

name: Double Door Sandwich Prep Refrigerator
desc: Double door sandwich prep table. GN pans included, glass canopy option available. Pre-installed castors, round corner design.

name: Chef Base 2 Drawers
desc: Low profile chef base for countertop cooking equipment. 2 gravity-fed drawers, stainless construction. 1/6 GN pans 100mm deep included.

name: Chef Base 4 Drawers
desc: 4-drawer chef base. Reinforced stainless top supports countertop cooking equipment. Magnetic drawer gaskets for easy cleaning.
